title: Claude Code Skill: DocSync — Automatic README and API Reference Generator
description: For backend developers, this skill scans codebases and auto-generates structured README files and API reference docs from functions, routes, and comments so they can ship well-documented libraries without writing a single doc line manually
gumroad_description:
Shipping undocumented code is a gift to no one, especially your future self.

Who this is for:
— Backend developers who finish features and skip docs because there's never time
— Open source maintainers whose README hasn't matched the code in six months
— Engineering leads inheriting codebases with no documentation whatsoever

What's inside:
— 1 ready-to-use SKILL.md file — drop into your project's skills/ folder
— Auto-generates structured README and API reference from functions, routes, and comments
— Works with any codebase; no annotations required
— Usage guide + real slash-command examples

One command. Complete documentation. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
